_comment: Source list for fetch-sources.py. Each source has a type, a name (unique), and type-specific fields. URLs marked 'VERIFY' may need correction — the script handles fetch failures gracefully and logs them in each draft's 'Sources with errors' section. Remove sources that don't work or add your own.

hyva.name: hyva-theme-module-releases
hyva.note: Hyvä default theme GitHub releases (VERIFY repo name — correct repo may differ)

hyva.name: hyva-compat-module-releases
hyva.note: Hyvä compat module releases (VERIFY repo name)

hyva.name: markshust-blog
hyva.note: Mark Shust's blog homepage — HTML diff. Fires 'page changed' when he posts new content (fallback since RSS URL couldn't be found). Maintainer of markshust/docker-magento, writes about Magento/Hyvä/Alpine/Tailwind. High signal for this stack.

hyva.name: hyva-docs-home
hyva.note: Hyvä docs homepage — HTML diff for 'page changed' detection

magento.name: magento2-releases
magento.note: Official Magento 2 GitHub releases (confirmed working — ~15 items per run)

security.name: nvd-magento-cve
security.note: NVD CVE feed for magento/adobe commerce keywords, last 14 days (confirmed free API)

security.name: sansec-research
security.note: Sansec labs page — HTML diff. THE highest-value Magento security source (discovers CVEs before Adobe acknowledges). Fires when the labs index changes. Manual click-through during Friday review.

adjacent.name: webdev-blog
adjacent.note: web.dev feed. VERIFY URL — may be different path.
